rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Impacket Atexec.py Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Impacket Atexec.py Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 6b588393-f45f-484b-8233-56bbc657c63c
status: experimental
description: Detects execution from Impacket's atexec.py. Part of the RedCanary 2023
  Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/impacket/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0357
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \svchost.exe
    - \taskeng.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - cmd.exe
    - windows\temp
    - 2>&1
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
